---
name: Release checklist
about: Track a framework or scaffolder release
labels: release
---

## Release target
- [ ] `create-thrust`
- [ ] framework docs / starter

## Pre-release
- [ ] version bumped
- [ ] template synced
- [ ] tests pass
- [ ] CSS builds
- [ ] pack test passes

## Publish
- [ ] workflow triggered
- [ ] npm package published
- [ ] post-publish smoke test passes

## Post-release
- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] roadmap updated if needed
